title: More Nonsense Limerick 86
content:
There was a young lady of Firle,
    Whose hair was addicted to curl;
    It curled up a tree, 
    And all over the sea,
    That expansive young lady of Firle.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 86"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
